---
title: "Carbon accounting QGIS plugin"
description: "PyQGIS Processing plugin that estimates the CO₂ balance of neighbourhood green from open geodata."
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [Python, QGIS, PyQGIS, Carbon]
---

## About

**GrünBilanz Quartier** is a QGIS Processing plugin that estimates the **CO₂ balance of
neighbourhood green** from open geodata. It detects trees and green areas from aerial imagery —
NDVI (CIR orthophotos) combined with a normalised surface model (nDOM = DOM − DGM), optionally
via AI segmentation — derives crown metrics, and estimates carbon stock and CO₂e through
allometry. A scenario step values the *planned* green of a development: carbon stock at
maturity, annual sequestration via a growth curve, and monetary valuation.

Four chainable Processing algorithms run headless via `qgis_process`, with a QGIS-independent,
unit-tested analysis core. Case study: the former HuKla industrial site in Gengenbach, using
open LGL Baden-Württemberg geodata.

## Stack

[Python]{.badge-skill} [PyQGIS]{.badge-skill} [QGIS]{.badge-skill} [Remote Sensing]{.badge-skill} [Carbon / CO₂]{.badge-skill}
